reasoning:
The base value on 2026-02-15 is 2776. To achieve an Elo rating 1% higher, Vincent Keymer would need a rating of at least 2803.76 (effectively 2804). 
For the first resolution date (2026-02-22): FIDE official ratings are published on the 1st of each month. The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' reflects these official monthly lists. Therefore, on Feb 22, the Wikipedia page will continue to show his February 1 rating of 2776. Thus, the probability of it being higher is extremely close to zero.
For the second resolution date (2026-03-17): The Wikipedia page will reflect the March 1, 2026 FIDE rating list. A gain of 28 Elo points in a single month (from 2776 to 2804) for a player at the super-GM level is extraordinarily rare and functionally impossible without an unpredicted, flawless string of victories in a major tournament. Such a leap in one month almost never occurs at the ~2775 rating tier. Therefore, the probability remains at the floor of 0.03.
